title: The Century Report: March 15 2026
description:
Vineyard Wind completed construction of all 62 turbines off the Massachusetts coast today - nine years after its first proposal and after surviving emergency stop-work orders that federal courts repeatedly found unsubstantiated - while Revolution Wind simultaneously began delivering power to New England's grid, together adding 1.5 GW of clean capacity and marking the most significant day in U.S. offshore wind history. The U.S. Army signed a 10-year, $20 billion enterprise contract with Anduril consolidating more than 120 separate procurement actions into a single software-defined platform relationship, arriving the same week xAI lost two more senior cofounders and SpaceX managers auditing staff found the opposite of what integrated platform development requires. Houston Methodist researchers published a finding placing TDP43 - already known to malfunction in ALS and frontotemporal dementia - at the center of DNA mismatch repair machinery, connecting neurodegeneration and cancer through a single molecular mechanism, while University of Barcelona scientists announced FLAV-27, an epigenetic compound that reversed Alzheimer's cognitive decline in multiple animal models by reprogramming which genes the diseased brain expresses. Waaree Energies broke ground on India's largest integrated solar ingot and wafer manufacturing facility - 10 GW capacity in Nagpur - as part of India's strategy to own the full photovoltaic value chain domestically.

Read the full edition: https://sharedsapience.com/the-century-report-march-15-2026/
